debug_info.goal:
case assert_range
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
var : Type
e : ℕ
c : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
h : Circuit p (ZMod p)
a_ih✝ : h.eval = Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.wrap p inst✝ (Clap.to_wg p inst✝ h) (Clap.to_cs p inst✝ (ZMod p) h))
⊢ (Circuit.assert_range e c h).eval =
    Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝
      (Clap.wrap p inst✝ (Clap.to_wg p inst✝ (Circuit.assert_range e c h))
        (Clap.to_cs p inst✝ (ZMod p) (Circuit.assert_range e c h)))

failed_attempts:
simp only [Circuit.eval, to_wg, to_cs, wrap]
    sorry

simp only [Circuit.eval, to_cs, to_wg, wrap, Cs.eval, Exp.eval]
    split <;> sorry

simp only [Circuit.eval, to_wg, to_cs]
    split
    case isTrue hw =>
      simp only [Cs.curry, wrap]
      sorry
    case isFalse hw =>
      simp only [Cs.curry, wrap]
      sorry

simp only [Circuit.eval, to_cs, to_wg, Cs.curry, wrap]
    split
    · simp only [Cs.eval, Exp.eval] at h ⊢
      exact h
    · simp only [Cs.eval, Exp.eval] at h ⊢
      exact h

simp only [Circuit.eval, to_wg, to_cs, wrap]
    sorry

simp only [Circuit.eval, to_cs, to_wg]
    split
    case isTrue hw =>
      simp only [Cs.eval, wrap]
      have bits := num2bits w (Exp.eval e)
      induction w generalizing bits with
      | zero =>
        simp [Cs.curry, assert_bits_e, bits2num_e, num2bits, wrap] at *
        exact h
      | succ n ih =>
        simp [Cs.curry, num2bits, wrap, List.foldl] at *
        sorry
    case isFalse hw =>
      sorry

simp only [Circuit.eval, to_wg, to_cs]
    split
    case isTrue hw =>
      sorry
    case isFalse hw =>
      sorry

simp only [Circuit.eval, to_cs, to_wg]
    split
    case isTrue hlt =>
      simp only [Cs.eval]
      sorry
    case isFalse hlt =>
      simp only [Cs.eval]
      sorry

simp only [Circuit.eval, to_cs, to_wg, wrap, Cs.eval]
    sorry

simp only [Circuit.eval, to_cs, to_wg]
    split
    case isTrue hw =>
      sorry
    case isFalse hw =>
      sorry

simp only [Circuit.eval, to_cs, to_wg, wrap]
    sorry

simp only [Circuit.eval, to_wg, to_cs, wrap]
    sorry
